subject: chore(wrap): strengthens + docs from wrap-up pass
body:
Four concrete code fixes + documentation updates from the `wrap`
reflective pass.

Code (cheap strengthens)
1. AppLayout burger-menu dark-mode icon: text-base-content/40 → /60
   on light-theme state (matches the /40 audit's spirit — the icon
   was missed because the iconClass was assembled conditionally).
2. CashflowGraph async import now has an errorComponent. Previously
   a failed chunk fetch rendered nothing silently; now shows a
   small "Couldn't load the chart. Refresh the page and try again."
   fallback with role="alert". Covers offline after SW cache
   eviction, stale deployment, CDN blip.
3. ImportStepReview.removeRow now bound-checks currentPage after
   splicing. Removing the last row on the last page previously left
   the pager pointing past totalPages (harmless but confusing — the
   list appeared blank until Previous was clicked).
4. WorkspaceListView.refreshList now re-runs loadStorageUsage so
   pull-to-refresh updates the storage indicator — users pulling
   after a large import expected the quota to reflect the new size.

Docs
- TESTING_GUIDE.md: added "Automated tests" section (vitest/happy-dom
  env note, coverage highlights) and "Performance-sensitive manual
  checks" (chart lazy-load Network-tab check, cash-on-hand debounce).
- TODO.md: added 3 Testing items for the new code this push didn't
  cover (storage indicator helpers, removeRow, runway debounce), 2
  A11y / Dark mode items (dark-theme contrast verification of the
  /40→/60 bumps, ChartLoadError component visual check), and 1
  Refactor item (move transactionDirty.ts out of src/components/).

Type-check clean. 135/135 tests pass. Production build succeeds.

Tags: docs, a11y, error-handling, pagination, pwa, storage
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: ux-polish
Semver: patch
title: strengthens + docs from wrap-up pass
